text: As I stand in this brightly lit, modern hallway and look through the glass wall into the R+D (Research and Development) space, I feel a subtle sense of anticipation. The environment is both clinical and creative—technology intertwined with vibrant design. Being here, I sense the pulse of human curiosity, the endless desire to discover, and a hint of reverence for knowledge-making. I feel like an observer on the precipice of innovation, eager and contemplative.
